reference.title: Create custom reports on Notes
reference.shortdesc: User has the ability to create custom reports on Notes created for the encounter.

section.title: Fields available for Custom reporting for Notes
section.p: The fields mentioned below are available for custom reporting and get displayed under the Encounter Note category in the Fields panel.

section.title: Features of custom reports on Notes

ul.li: In order to create report, you can select the required fields from the Encounter Note category.
An encounter can have multiple notes and each note can have multiple conversations. Each conversation will be displayed as a separate row in the custom report.
